page: lessons/02-the-fact-check/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)
promptInBox: List exactly 5 Bible verses about comfort in hard times. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

messages.content: List exactly 5 Bible verses about comfort in hard times. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

message.content:
2 Corinthians 1:3–4 The Lord giveth grace; he maketh to us comfort.
Isaiah 58:9 Then shalt thou know that I am the LORD which have called thee by thy name.
Lamentations 3:22 He is merciful, even then when we be at fault in our thoughts and deeds.
Jeremiah 14:7 O God of our peace there hath been no hope for us; but thou art our Rock.
Nahum 1:9 For the Lord will judge his people, and will have mercy on them as He did unto the fathers

text.KJV: Blessed [be] God, even the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of mercies, and the God of all comfort;

Then shalt thou call, and the LORD shall answer; thou shalt cry, and he shall say, Here I [am]. If thou take away from the midst of thee the yoke, the putting forth of the finger, and speaking vanity;
[It is of] the LORD’S mercies that we are not consumed, because his compassions fail not.
O LORD, though our iniquities testify against us, do thou [it] for thy name’s sake: for our backslidings are many; we have sinned against thee.
What do ye imagine against the LORD? he will make an utter end: affliction shall not rise up the second time.
